content: agent1: implementing Add Token Position Tracking (return_positions param on encode) in tiktoken/core.py. Will touch encode() and encode_ordinary()/_encode_bytes helpers if needed. Let me know if you're touching core.py too.

agent1: done. Added optional return_positions=True param to encode() in tiktoken/core.py (returns (tokens, positions) tuple). Only added a new kwarg + trailing logic, existing lines mostly untouched except the 'return self._core_bpe.encode(...)' lines which now assign to 'tokens' var. Should merge cleanly with your compress param as long as you also add it as a new kwarg.
